hero.description: Plant seeds, harvest crops, and turn Sheckles into a stronger garden while your plants keep growing offline. Grow a Garden 2 adds guild rewards and nighttime stealing, so smart layouts, defenses, and seed choices matter from the first session.

aboutGame.title: What is Grow a Garden 2?
paragraphs: Grow a Garden 2 is a Roblox farming simulator where players buy seeds, plant crops, harvest them, and sell produce for Sheckles. The core loop is easy to understand, but the sequel adds more pressure through guild competition and nighttime stealing.

The biggest player questions are about active codes, best early seeds, how to farm Sheckles, how to defend a garden at night, and which pets or badges are worth chasing. A fan wiki should focus on fast beginner answers first, then expand into seed lists, defense layouts, guild rewards, and update tracking.

explore.title: Grow a Garden 2 Homepage Modules Navigation
explore.description: Jump straight to the eight homepage sections and scroll to the module you need.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Codes
modules.description: Track the latest redeemable Grow a Garden 2 codes for free launch rewards. Useful for players who want quick freebies before starting their garden progression.

highlights.label: TEAMGREENBEAN
highlights.detail: Redeem for 3 Green Bean Seeds.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Beginner Guide
modules.description: A quick start guide covering the core loop of buying seeds, planting crops, harvesting, and selling for Sheckles. It also introduces offline growth, guild rewards, and the nighttime stealing mechanic.

highlights.detail: Buy seeds from the shop when the stock refreshes.
Plant seeds in your farm plots and wait for them to grow.
Harvest crops and sell them for Sheckles.
Use your profits to buy better seeds, gears, pets, and props.
Create or join a guild to compete for exclusive weekly rewards.
Prepare for nighttime, because stealing starts when night falls.
Keep progressing even offline, because gardens continue growing while you are away.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Seeds Tier List
modules.description: A seed ranking module for players who want to know which crops are worth planting first. The tiers focus on average sell value, harvest type, seed cost, ROI, and defensive value.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Ghost Pepper, Dragon's Breath, Venus Flytrap, Moon Bloom.

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: Poison Ivy, Poison Apple, Pomegranate, Sunflower, Mushroom.

highlights.label: B

highlights.label: C
highlights.detail: Mango, Coconut, Grape, Banana, Green Bean, Pineapple, Cactus, Corn, Apple, Tulip.

highlights.label: D
highlights.detail: Tomato, Blueberry, Strawberry, Carrot.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Pets Guide
modules.description: A pet guide module for players comparing prices, rarities, and abilities. Pets can support farming, movement, mutations, stealing, and garden defense.

highlights.label: Frog
highlights.detail: Common pet costing 10K Sheckles; increases jump height by +5.

highlights.label: Bunny
highlights.detail: Common pet costing 20K Sheckles; increases walk speed by +5.

highlights.label: Deer
highlights.detail: Rare pet costing 50K Sheckles; helps plants grow 10% faster.

highlights.label: Dragonfly
highlights.detail: Mythic pet costing 3M Sheckles; boosts gold chance by 2x.

highlights.label: Unicorn
highlights.detail: Mythic pet costing 4M Sheckles; doubles the chance of rainbow fruits.

highlights.label: Raccoon
highlights.detail: Super pet costing 5M Sheckles; steals fruit from empty gardens at night and increases the steal limit by +25.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Guilds Guide
modules.description: A focused guide for the new guild system in Grow a Garden 2. This module helps players understand guild creation, invitations, leaderboards, and weekly rewards.

highlights.detail: Find the Guild booth in the central hub.
Create a guild or join an existing guild through an invitation.
Compete with other guilds in global competitions.
Check guild leaderboards to track progress.
Claim exclusive weekly rewards when your guild performs well.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Stealing and Defense Guide
modules.description: A practical module for the nighttime stealing system and base protection. It explains when stealing starts, how raids work, and which defensive options matter most.

highlights.detail: Wait for night to start, because PvP stealing begins during nighttime.
Enter other players' gardens and attempt to steal crops.
You cannot harvest from a garden while the owner is inside the plot.
Protect your own garden with defensive crops, props, walls, fences, and traps.
Prioritize Bear Trap Crate items to stop thieves from escaping with valuable crops.
Use Fence Crate and Owner Door Crate items to reduce entry points and control access to your base.

modules.name: Grow a Garden 2 Weather Events
modules.description: A weather module for players who want to catch growth boosts, mutation chances, and special seed spawns. Weather events are important because they can directly affect crop value and farming speed.

highlights.label: Rain
highlights.detail: Lasts 5 minutes and gives 2x growth speed to all plants.

highlights.label: Lightning
highlights.detail: Lasts 5 minutes and gives Shocked or Electric mutation to random crops.

highlights.label: Rainbow
highlights.detail: Lasts 5 minutes and increases rainbow fruit chance.

highlights.label: Snowfall
highlights.detail: Lasts 2 minutes 30 seconds and gives Frozen mutation to random crops.

highlights.label: Starfall
highlights.detail: Lasts 2 minutes and gives Starstruck mutation to random crops.

highlights.label: Gold Seed
highlights.detail: Lasts 2 minutes and spawns golden seeds randomly.

highlights.label: Rainbow Seed
highlights.detail: Lasts 2 minutes and spawns rainbow seeds randomly.

highlights.label: Rainbow Moon
highlights.detail: Lasts 2 minutes and makes stolen fruits become rainbow.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about Grow a Garden 2.

items.question: What is Grow a Garden 2?
items.answer: Grow a Garden 2 is a free-to-play farming simulator on Roblox developed by Strawberreh Squad. Players buy seeds, plant crops, harvest them, and sell produce for Sheckles. The sequel introduces guild competition, nighttime stealing, pets with special abilities, weather events, and offline growth so your garden keeps progressing even when you are away.

items.question: Which seeds should beginners plant first in Grow a Garden 2?
items.answer: Start with low-cost, fast-growing crops like Carrots, Tomatoes, and Strawberries to build your first Sheckles. Once you have a stable income, reinvest in higher-tier seeds like Green Beans and Sunflowers. Check the Seeds Tier List for a full ranking by profit margin, growth time, and defensive value.

items.question: How does nighttime stealing work in Grow a Garden 2?
items.answer: When night falls in Grow a Garden 2, PvP stealing becomes active. Players can enter other gardens and attempt to steal crops, but they cannot harvest from a plot while the owner is inside it. Defend your garden with fences, bear traps, owner doors, and defensive crops like Venus Flytraps and Poison Ivy to deter thieves.

items.question: Where do I find active Grow a Garden 2 codes?
items.answer: Check the Codes page for all working Grow a Garden 2 codes with their rewards and expiration notes. Codes like TEAMGREENBEAN grant free seeds and are regularly updated. Redeem them early before they expire.

items.question: Are Grow a Garden 2 pets and guilds worth investing in?
items.answer: Yes — pets provide passive bonuses like faster growth, higher jump, and stealing abilities that directly improve your farming efficiency. Guilds unlock weekly competitions with exclusive rewards. Even a common pet like the Bunny (walk speed +5) helps you move between plots faster, and joining an active guild gives you access to rewards you cannot earn solo.

finalCta.title: Ready to Master Grow a Garden 2?
finalCta.description: From your first seed purchase to night defense, guild rewards, pets, and badges, this community wiki helps you grow faster and avoid beginner mistakes.
